Oracle Events
- Search Linear for DOT/hazmat/April relocation tickets -> discovers Tickets #1–#5 under DOT Compliance Audit project (Mei-Lin Zhao, Keiko Tanaka, Raj Patel, Joaquín Reyes, Swift cert subtask).
- Search emails for PHMSA/placarding cert/hazmat -> discovers Linda Castellano letters, Greg Pallone cert confirmation, Blessing placarding gap.
- Search Slack for DOT/Heartland/Blessing discussions → discovers #operations and #finance threads on placarding cert, Heartland dispute, prototype damage. *
- Pull Airtable relocation records to identify all April moves and their coordinators, vendors, and special requirements → discover all ~20+ April relocations, including Diego Castaneda CNC mill, Marcus Webb cryogenic, Emilia Cruz piano, Dr. Kovacs cross-border.
- Search QuickBooks for Heartland invoice/billing dispute → discovers $4,800 overbilling on HM-2026-Q1-0042, payment hold.
- Update existing Linear tickets (#1, #2, #3, #4, #5) with audit findings and documentation status. *
- Send email (via send_email) from chloe.vance@moveops.com to chloe.vance@moveops.com with full audit-readiness summary
- Send email (via send_email) from chloe.vance@moveops.com to marcus.thorne@moveops.com flagging June 5 deadline blockers.
